title: Dekton 40MM Iron Padlock | Heavy-Duty Iron Construction with Tough Shackle | Includes 3 Steel Keys | Ideal for Gates, Sheds & Storage | Durable Locking Mechanism | For Home and Industrial Use
features: Heavy-Duty Iron Construction: The Dekton Iron Padlock features a robust iron body designed to withstand heavy use and resist tampering. Its durable construction ensures long-lasting performance and reliable security for a wide range of applications.

Tough Shackle for Enhanced Security: Equipped with a hardened steel shackle, this padlock offers superior resistance to cutting and prying. The tough shackle is engineered to provide added protection, making it ideal for securing gates, sheds, and other valuable items.

Includes 3 Steel Keys: The padlock comes with three steel keys, allowing for convenient access and extra copies for family members or authorized users. The keys are designed for smooth operation and reliable performance, ensuring ease of use.

Versatile Applications: Suitable for a variety of uses, this padlock is perfect for securing gates, storage units, sheds, lockers, and more. Its versatile design makes it a practical choice for both residential and industrial settings.

Reliable Locking Mechanism: The Dekton Iron Padlock features a dependable locking mechanism that ensures secure closure and resistance to unauthorized access. Its sturdy build and effective locking system provide peace of mind and enhanced security for your belongings.
description: From the manufacturer 40MM IRON PADLOCK Iron body. Brass cylinder locking mechanism. Suitable for securing residential/commercial property, factories & garages. A3 Hardened steel shackle. Includes 3 keys. ADVANCED LEVEL OF SECURITY HARDENED STEEL SHACKLE Excellent anti-cut resistance. Heat treated to be harder, safer and cut resistant. IRON BODY Iron body. Brass cylinder locking mechanism. AVAILABLE IN 40MM, 50MM, 60MM Available in standard shackle. Sizes include: 40mm, 50mm and 60mm. IDEAL FOR SECURING Residential / Commercial property. Factories / Garages. Sheds / Fences. Doors/ Gates. Motorbikes / Bicycles. Tools / Gardening equipment.
